summary: This document serves as the Technical File for KeepMeCompany's AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform, detailing its function as an AI-driven phone system for UK GP practices. It specifies the operational workflow, intended user population, and regulatory classification as a Class I medical device under EU MDR 2017/745. The file also lists unique device identifiers and references associated clinical evaluation reports.
